sourcePolicy.currentDay: Live connector only for selected dates after the latest uploaded history/hourly files, or manual upload at EOD.
sourcePolicy.posRule: Product sales files are used for product volume when present. Hourly workbook is used for daily/hourly sales totals. Large ticket history CSVs are skipped by default on Render; set IMPORT_PARSE_TICKET_HISTORY=true only for a heavier/offline parse.

diagnostics.mode: 0.2.21 import corrections: hourly/product files first; large ticket CSVs are skipped unless IMPORT_PARSE_TICKET_HISTORY=true.

live.notes: Beta 0.2.14 moves POS to dashboard/eod/daily page sync first, makes ticket rows optional enrichment, adds connector diagnostics, Square official API sync, Uber browser/API diagnostics, production shape map, hiring/training/audit modules and stale-data suppression.

stores.name: Beverly Hills
stores.focus: Do not judge Beverly Hills from POS alone until POS ticket sync and Uber daily capture are both available.

stores.name: Penrith
stores.focus: Protect the afternoon cabinet before 3pm and compare hour-by-hour against same day last week.

stores.name: Taren Point
stores.focus: Protect early trade and stock/display follow-up.

stores.name: Frieda's Pies
stores.focus: Viral pie demand is strong. Train staff properly across stores and protect Beef & Cheese, Chunky Beef Cheese and Garlic Naan.

fredaFeedbackPriorities: Compare sales hour by hour to the same day last week and the last 4 weeks, including Uber where a same-day Uber capture/API value exists.
Track what time each store sells out and whether sell-out is earlier than expected.
Separate planned sell-outs / FOMO from operational sell-outs that happen too early.
Track what is left over most often and what sells out first.
Monitor donut production mix properly, especially rings vs balls, because specials are using more balls.
Use WhatsApp stock photos/messages to work out weekly stock usage and plan stock in two trips instead of daily driver pressure.
Capture pie momentum from the viral NZ review / social media lift.
Make staff training and hiring the biggest focus while the stores have momentum.

rules: Use product-specific shape mapping instead of fixed 65/35.
Specials Total is mixed: 55% ring, 30% ball, 5% long, 5% scroll, 5% apple.
Filled/custard items remain BALL. Ring-style premium items remain RING. Cream Finger Bun/Eclairs are LONG.
